steps.name: Verify repository automation contracts
steps.run: set -euo pipefail make check-shared-bijux-py check-config-layout check-make-layout help

include.post_test_command: set -euo pipefail && venv_python="${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/venv/bin/python" && if compgen -G "packages/bijux-canon-runtime/src/bijux_canon_runtime/providers/*" > /dev/null; then "${venv_python}" -m coverage report --rcfile configs/coveragerc.ini --data-file "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/test/.coverage" --include "packages/bijux-canon-runtime/src/bijux_canon_runtime/providers/*" --fail-under=65; fi && if [ -f "packages/bijux-canon-runtime/src/bijux_canon_runtime/interfaces/cli.py" ]; then "${venv_python}" -m coverage report --rcfile configs/coveragerc.ini --data-file "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/test/.coverage" --include "packages/bijux-canon-runtime/src/bijux_canon_runtime/interfaces/cli.py" --fail-under=60; fi && if compgen -G "packages/bijux-canon-runtime/src/bijux_canon_runtime/api/*" > /dev/null; then "${venv_python}" -m coverage report --rcfile configs/coveragerc.ini --data-file "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/test/.coverage" --include "packages/bijux-canon-runtime/src/bijux_canon_runtime/api/*" --fail-under=75; fi

steps.name: Require repository and package verification success
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
[[ "${REPOSITORY_RESULT}" == "success" ]]
[[ "${PACKAGE_RESULT}" == "success" ]]

steps.name: Run formatting checks
steps.run: make gh-fmt

steps.name: Run lint checks
steps.run: make gh-lint

steps.name: Install Rust security tools
steps.run: make gh-security-install-rust-tools

steps.name: Run security checks
steps.run: make gh-security

steps.name: Install cargo-nextest
steps.run: make gh-test-install-rust-tools

steps.name: Run test suites
steps.run: make gh-test

steps.name: Minimal CI gate
steps.run:
make ssot-policy-fast
make ci-fast

steps.name: Slow CI gate
steps.run: make ci-slow

steps.name: Example schema + dry plan
steps.run: make ci-fast

steps.name: Registry tools must have container defs
steps.run: make ci-fast

steps.name: Container defs must exist in registry
steps.run: make ci-fast

steps.name: Install package toolchain
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" install

steps.name: Run tests
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" test

steps.name: Run post-test validation
steps.run: ${{ inputs.post_test_command }}

steps.name: Install package toolchain
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" install

steps.name: Run ${{ matrix.target }}
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" ${{ matrix.target }}

steps.name: Install package toolchain
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" install

steps.name: Run lint
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" lint

steps.name: Run repository checks
steps.run: set -euo pipefail make check-shared-bijux-py check-config-layout check-make-layout help

steps.name: Confirm clean worktree after checks
steps.run: set -euo pipefail; if [[ -n "$(git status --short)" ]]; then git status --short; exit 1; fi

steps.name: Require repository and package verification success
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
[[ "${REPOSITORY_RESULT}" == "success" ]]
[[ "${PACKAGE_RESULT}" == "success" ]]

steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" install

steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" test

steps.name: Run post-test validation
steps.run: ${{ inputs.post_test_command }}

steps.name: Install package toolchain
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" install

steps.name: Run ${{ matrix.target }}
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" ${{ matrix.target }}

steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" install

steps.name: Run lint
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" lint

steps.name: Run repository checks
steps.run: set -euo pipefail make check-shared-bijux-py check-config-layout check-make-layout help

steps.name: Confirm clean worktree after checks
steps.run: set -euo pipefail; if [[ -n "$(git status --short)" ]]; then git status --short; exit 1; fi

steps.name: Install package toolchain
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" install

steps.name: Run tests
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" test

steps.run: ${{ inputs.post_test_command }}

steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" install

steps.name: Run ${{ matrix.target }}
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" ${{ matrix.target }}

steps.name: Install package toolchain
steps.run: set -euo pipefail makefile="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/makes/packages/$(basename '${{ inputs.package_dir }}').mk" make -f "$makefile" -C "${{ inputs.package_dir }}" install

steps.name: Verify repository automation contracts
steps.run: set -euo pipefail make check-shared-bijux-py check-config-layout check-make-layout help

steps.name: Require repository and package verification success
steps.run:
set -euo pipefail
[[ "${REPOSITORY_RESULT}" == "success" ]]
[[ "${PACKAGE_RESULT}" == "success" ]]

steps.name: Run formatting checks
steps.run: make fmt-rs

steps.name: Install Linux build dependencies
steps.run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install --yes pkg-config libfontconfig1-dev libfreetype6-dev

steps.name: Run lint checks
steps.run: make lint-rs

steps.name: Install Rust security tools
steps.run: cargo install --locked cargo-deny --version "${{ env.CARGO_DENY_VERSION }}" && cargo install --locked cargo-audit --version "${{ env.CARGO_AUDIT_VERSION }}"

steps.name: Run security checks
steps.run: make audit-rs

steps.name: Install Linux build dependencies
steps.run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install --yes pkg-config libfontconfig1-dev libfreetype6-dev

steps.name: Install cargo-nextest
steps.run: cargo install --locked cargo-nextest --version "${{ env.CARGO_NEXTEST_VERSION }}"

steps.name: Run test suites
steps.run: make test-rs
